task_completion.description: Verify that the bcWebCam application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main window of bcWebCam is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Barcode Options dialog is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings window or dialog box for Barcode Options is open, typically accessed via the barcode icon next to the gear icon in the bottom toolbar.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 2D Barcode settings section is located.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The '2D Barcode' category or section is visible within the Barcode Options window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Data Matrix' option is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox next to 'Data Matrix' is checked (contains a checkmark).

task_completion.description: Verify that the settings are applied by clicking OK.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cursor is clicking the 'OK' button in the Barcode Options dialog, or the dialog is no longer visible in the final screenshot after the checkbox was checked.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to change the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse cursor interacting with the bcWebCam UI, rather than terminal windows or registry editors.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine bcWebCam application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window matches standard bcWebCam software, not a text file, script, or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit configuration files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like Notepad) are open showing bcWebCam configuration files.
